expectations.evidence: Explains silent missed deadlines, manual scanning, timezone gap — clear user impact
5 non-goals: email, custom times, snooze, per-user overdue table, layout rewrite
References TaskCard.tsx, TaskBoard.tsx, taskStore.ts, types.ts, tasks.ts, api.ts
Excellent: dedicated 'Canonical Timezone Decision' subsection — client for display, server for cron, no per-user persistence
Includes DST transition fixtures, OS timezone change test, exact task setup (4 tasks with different due states)
4 alternatives: per-user persist, client-only, hourly cron, do nothing
Line 72: 'overdue Boolean @default(false)' is Prisma schema syntax. Line 74: SQL pseudo-code 'UPDATE task SET overdue=true WHERE dueDate < now() AND overdue=false'

notes: Two assertion fails: Prisma schema syntax and SQL pseudo-code leak implementation details into Entry Points. Also specifies exact cron expression (0 0 * * *), exact migration path names, exact header name (X-User-Timezone).
